pi_items.source: Verified by reading the explicit task instructions in task.json and the path checked by export_result.sh.

pi_items.metadata_value: [{"long_task": "Backend API Development", "short_task": "System Architecture Design"}, {"long_task": "Frontend Development", "short_task": "Requirements Gathering"}]
pi_items.source: Contradicted by analyzing the loaded data file (assets/sample_project.xml). The setup_task.sh script loads a "Commercial Construction" template, missing these software development tasks completely.

privileged_info_summary: The task instructions and verifier expect an "Enterprise Software Development Project" with tasks like "Backend API Development" and "System Architecture Design". However, the environment"s setup_task.sh script fails to execute the synthetic data generator (create_sample_project.py) and instead loads a default "Commercial Construction" template from assets/sample_project.xml. As a result, the required tasks do not exist in the data provided to the agent, making the sorting verification logic fail.
